# RKLB Investor Dashboard — robots.txt
# Live at https://spotswoods.github.io/rklb-dashboard/
# NOTE: on a GitHub Pages PROJECT site, crawlers read robots.txt from the domain
# root (https://spotswoods.github.io/robots.txt), not this subpath — so submit the
# sitemap directly in Google Search Console rather than relying on this file.

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Don't crawl the auto-generated quote JSON or workflow internals
Disallow: /rklb-dashboard/data/
Disallow: /rklb-dashboard/.github/

# Be friendly to LLM crawlers / answer engines too
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://spotswoods.github.io/rklb-dashboard/sitemap.xml
